query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `documents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`category` enum('plan','report','contract','permit','photo','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
	`phase` enum('feasibility','sketch','preliminary','detailed','execution','site_prep','construction','delivery','archived'),
	`version` int DEFAULT 1,
	`fileUrl` text,
	`fileKey` text,
	`mimeType` varchar(100),
	`fileSize` int,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `documents_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `project_phases` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`phase` enum('feasibility','sketch','preliminary','detailed','execution','site_prep','construction','delivery','archived') NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed','skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`startDate` timestamp,
	`endDate` timestamp,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `project_phases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `project_phases_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `comments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`documentId` int,
	`authorName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `comments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `comments_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `comments_documentId_documents_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`documentId`) REFERENCES `documents`(`id`) ON DELETE set null ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin_procedures` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','submitted','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`dueDate` timestamp,
	`notes` text,
	`checklist` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `admin_procedures_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `admin_procedures_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `site_journal_entries` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`siteId` int NOT NULL,
	`date` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`weather` varchar(100),
	`workDescription` text NOT NULL,
	`workers` int,
	`photos` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `site_journal_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `site_journal_entries_siteId_construction_sites_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`siteId`) REFERENCES `construction_sites`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `meeting_reports` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`siteId` int NOT NULL,
	`date` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`attendees` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`summary` text,
	`decisions` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`nextActions` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `meeting_reports_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `meeting_reports_siteId_construction_sites_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`siteId`) REFERENCES `construction_sites`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `incidents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`siteId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`severity` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`status` enum('open','in_progress','resolved') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
	`date` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`resolution` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `incidents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `incidents_siteId_construction_sites_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`siteId`) REFERENCES `construction_sites`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `time_entries` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`memberId` int NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int,
	`taskId` int,
	`date` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`hours` float NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `time_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `time_entries_memberId_team_members_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`memberId`) REFERENCES `team_members`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `time_entries_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE set null ON UPDATE no action,
	CONSTRAINT `time_entries_taskId_tasks_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`taskId`) REFERENCES `tasks`(`id`) ON DELETE set null ON UPDATE no action
);

	CONSTRAINT `admin_procedures_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action
